members.cardDescription: Role changes apply on the next request, and team changes apply from the next collection onward (past events keep the team they were attributed to at the time). If Last received is empty, the shim is not installed or collection is not connected.
members.outdatedBanner: {count, plural, one {# device runs} other {# devices run}} an outdated shim — auto-update may be stalled

teams.cardDescription: Create teams and assign them from the Members tab. Rankings and comparisons are reflected in the Teams tab of the overview.
teams.empty: No teams yet. Add one below.
teams.cannotDeleteHasMembers: Cannot delete because it has members
teams.cannotDeleteHasEvents: Cannot delete because collection history is attributed to it
teams.deleteConfirmDescription: Only teams with no members and no collection history can be deleted, and this cannot be undone.

invites.cardDescription: Create an invitation link and share it — the recipient sets a password to sign up and continues through installation.
invites.noTeams: Create a team before sending invitations.
invites.linkCreatedToast: Created an invitation link for {email} — copy and share it.

system.pricingDescription: Fetches LiteLLM model pricing for cost calculation. Without pricing, costs are calculated as $0 — you can run it manually here, independent of auto sync.
system.noPricing: No pricing has been synced — collected costs are calculated as $0.
system.repriceDescription: Recalculates every retained event with the current LiteLLM pricing. Historic events retain input, output, and cache token counts only, so fast mode and one-hour cache creation use the default pricing fallback.
system.repriced: Repricing complete — {count} events · {unpriced} models without pricing
system.contentDescription: Whether prompt and response content is stored. Requires a server encryption key (KEK); once on, users can opt in to content collection during install.
system.contentEnabledBody: Content is envelope-encrypted on the server, and each user views only their own in /history.
system.contentSetupHint: Set the following in the server env and restart to enable.
system.contentSetupNote: See docs/DEPLOY.md for switching to the app role (toard_app) that enforces RLS. If the key is lost, existing content cannot be decrypted.
system.serverDescription: Information about the running toard server. Check here after a deploy to confirm the version changed.
system.updateUnavailable: The server updater agent is not configured.
system.updateUnavailableHint: For a Compose install, enable the updater profile and set TOARD_UPDATER_URL/TOARD_UPDATER_SECRET to update to the latest release here.
system.autoSyncHint: When on, the server syncs once a day (org timezone). Changes take effect within an hour, no restart needed.
system.autoSyncUnavailable: The built-in scheduler is inactive in this deployment (Vercel cron or PRICING_AUTO_SYNC=off) — an external scheduler handles syncing.

errors.invalidEmail: This is not a valid email format.
errors.teamRequired: Please choose a team for the invitation.
errors.teamNotFound: The selected team could not be found.
errors.teamNameTooLong: Team names must be 50 characters or fewer.
errors.teamHasMembers: A team with members cannot be deleted.
errors.teamHasEvents: A team with attributed collection history cannot be deleted.
errors.roleInvalid: The selected role is not valid.
errors.userNotFound: The selected member could not be found.
errors.lastAdminRequired: The last administrator cannot be changed to member.
errors.pricingDownloadKept: Pricing download failed, so the existing snapshot was kept — {error}
errors.repriceConfirmationRequired: Type REPRICE exactly to run full-retention repricing.
errors.repriceClickHouseMaintenance: ClickHouse requires rebuilding raw events plus hourly and 15-minute rollups together. Online repricing is blocked.
errors.autoSyncSaveFailed: Failed to save auto sync setting: {error}
